name: NIGHTFALL
author: Yuko

placementContext.reason: Nightfall concludes the legendary Twilight trilogy with the hardest fully 2.2-based map yet, aiming to redefine top-tier mechanical challenge for the modern era.

description: A masterpiece of 2.2 creative potential, Nightfall features stunning visual storytelling and extreme mechanical timings that push the boundaries of what is possible in the update.
